name: Mason Luxury
description: An exquisite blend of contemporary design and timeless elegance. Featuring a king-sized bed, premium linens, a spacious en-suite bathroom with a rainfall shower, and a private balcony with panoramic city views.

name: VIP Suite
description: Our crown jewel — a full suite experience with a separate living room, dining area, and bedroom. Draped in rich fabrics and fine furnishings, ideal for the most discerning guests seeking the pinnacle of luxury.

name: Special Mason Luxury
description: A curated upgrade from our flagship Luxury room — enhanced with premium finishes, expanded living space, and bespoke amenities designed for guests who desire that extra touch of distinction.

name: Business Executive
description: Designed for the modern professional. A refined workspace, high-speed connectivity, and a restful bedroom converge to create the perfect environment for productivity and recovery.

name: Mason Deluxe
description: Warm, inviting, and thoughtfully appointed — the Mason Deluxe offers genuine comfort at an exceptional value. Perfect for short stays or budget-conscious guests who refuse to compromise on quality.
